channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Nairobi property manager sentenced to three years for embezzling tenant rent
item.description: A Nairobi-based property manager, Peter Gathungu Gikonyo, has been sentenced to three years in prison for misappropriating over Sh6 million in rent payments from tenants, marking the end of a six-year...

item.title: Researchers document rare Congo fish species that climbs waterfalls
item.description: A remarkable natural phenomenon has been recorded in the Democratic Republic of the Congo, where a species of small fish, Parakneria thysi, has been observed scaling the 15‑metre‑tall Luvilombo Falls....

item.title: Trump threatens devastation in the Middle East as deadline looms; US targets Iranian infrastructure
item.description: US President Donald Trump issued a dire warning that ‘a whole civilisation will die tonight’ unless Iran agrees to a deal by the 8pm Tuesday deadline (10am Wednesday AEST). The agreement includes the ...

item.title: UK politicians call for restrictions on US use of bases amid threats to Iran
item.description: Keir Starmer is under mounting pressure from MPs across several parties to restrict the United States from using British military bases in response to threatening remarks made by former US President D...

item.title: Graduate’s Business Destroyed by Fire, Seeks Help to Rebuild
item.description: Ashura Shabani, a young graduate, found herself devastated after a fire destroyed her business, leaving her with nothing but heartbreak. The 2023 graduate had invested KSh 200,000 from her internship ...

item.title: Prime Minister urges Australians to work together amid fuel crisis
item.description: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese delivered a rare address to the nation, echoing the reassuring tone of previous national crises such as the early days of COVID-19. In his speech, Albanese acknowledged...

item.title: Chhattisgarh CM Outlines Comprehensive Development Plan for Bastar to PM Modi
item.description: On Tuesday, Chhattisgarh Chief Minister Vishnu Deo Sai had a meeting with Prime Minister Narendra Modi in New Delhi, where he shared a forward-looking vision for the development of Bastar, a region hi...

item.title: Blue Jays adjust roster as Barger moves to injured list and Corbin recalled
item.description: The Toronto Blue Jays have made several roster moves following injuries and performance considerations. Outfielder Addison Barger has been placed on the injured list after spraining his left ankle dur...

item.title: Sharp Political Exchange Between Kerala and Telangana CMs on Campaign's Final Day
item.description: On the last day of campaigning for the April 9 elections, Kerala's Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan and Telangana's CM Revanth Reddy engaged in a bitter war of words. This verbal duel began when Vijaya...

item.title: Anthropic Introduces Claude Mythos, an Advanced AI for Cybersecurity Research
item.description: Anthropic has introduced Claude Mythos, a next-generation AI model capable of detecting critical software vulnerabilities on a large scale. This model surpasses previous Anthropic models, including Ha...

item.title: Kalenjin and Luo Elders Join Hands to Support Ruto’s 2027 Re-election
item.description: During Easter Monday celebrations at the home of Health Principal Secretary Dr Ouma Oluga in Uyoma, a rare gathering of Kalenjin and Luo councils of elders pledged their united support for President W...

item.title: Iran Prepares for Any Response as US-Iran Tensions Escalate
item.description: Iran don yan say dem dey ready for any kind wahala after US President Donald Trump yan say 'whole civilization go die' if Iran no open the Strait of Hormuz. Trump make this kind threat as deadline dey...

item.title: Alberta expresses concerns over federal nature protection plan
item.description: Alberta has raised objections to the federal government's newly announced $3.8-billion nature strategy, which aims to protect 1.6 million square kilometres of land and increase Canada's protected area...

item.title: Ray Dalio warns of looming global conflict amid Trump’s Iran decisions
item.description: As tensions rise over Donald Trump's stance on Iran, Ray Dalio, a prominent investor and macroeconomic thinker, has issued a stark warning that World War III could be closer than ever. Drawing from hi...

item.title: Nigeria's Annual Cybercrime Losses Top $20 Billion
item.description: A concerning report reveals that Nigeria is grappling with a significant surge in cybercrime losses, exceeding $20 billion annually. The report, sourced from the Internet Crime Complaint Center (IC3),...

item.title: Afrobarometer Survey: Performance Still Drives Support for Democracy in South Africa
item.description: A recent Afrobarometer survey reveals a nuanced picture of democratic sentiment in South Africa. While there's been a slight uptick in appreciation for democratic governance, the overall commitment re...

item.title: VP Sara Duterte Seeks Supreme Court Intervention in Impeachment Proceedings
item.description: Vice President Sara Duterte has formally petitioned the Supreme Court (SC) to prevent her impending impeachment proceedings, according to lawyer Bruce Ridon. The move, which seeks to halt the impeachm...

item.title: Real Madrid v Bayern Munich: Team news and build-up for Champions League quarter-final first leg
item.description: Real Madrid host Bayern Munich in the first leg of their UEFA Champions League quarter-final at the Santiago Bernabéu on 7 April 2026. Despite a mixed domestic season and a recent La Liga defeat to Ma...

item.title: KPA Boss Captain William Ruto Mourns Daughter Mitchell After Fatal Accident
item.description: Captain William Ruto, the head of Kenya Ports Authority, is grieving the loss of his beloved daughter, Mitchell Kemboi, following a tragic road accident in Taita Taveta on Friday night, April 3. The f...

item.title: GTCO Reports Strong 2025 Financial Performance with Robust Dividends and Efficient Operations
item.description: Guaranty Trust Holding Company (GTCO) Plc continue dey show why e dey top among Nigerian banks. For 2025, dem post Profit Before Tax (PBT) of N1.23 trillion, thanks to strong growth and efficient oper...
